description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define two stages, test and deploy. Add a test job named test that runs in the test stage, executes the shell command `source ./build.sh`, and uploads the public directory as an artifact, but it should run on all branches except master. Add a pages job named pages that runs in the deploy stage, also runs `source ./build.sh`, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. No services, caches, or additional variables are required.
